name: Tunner/Tan - Sprunki.
description:
🌾 | He fell off the tree on his break.

🌈| Sprunki!

Its me Wolfkat back with another bot wowie! Sorry for it not being a dandys world one..Sprunki has been on my mind for a while and my favorite character is Tunner, so..No promises the next one will be another Dandys, sorry people.

I dont know the artist, if you do please link the creators account in the comments/reviews.

All my bots will always be anypov for users, unless if its a ship I like. Then again I can just do that in private.

If the bot speaks for you that is out of my control.
creator: W0lf_kat!!
